metadata.summary: Comprehensive documentation review found 89 issues: 15 critical (doc-code mismatches), 21 high (broken examples/links), 23 medium (inconsistencies), 30 low (minor issues)

tasks.title: [Docs] Fix AgentResponse documentation - output type mismatch
tasks.description: Documentation shows AgentResponse.output as Dict[str, Any] but code has it as str. Also missing fields.

core_functionality: Change output: Dict[str, Any] to output: str
Add tokens, estimated_cost_usd, latency_seconds, error, confidence fields
Update all code examples using AgentResponse
documentation: Update field descriptions to match implementation

tasks.notes: CRITICAL: Code using documented signature will fail

tasks.title: [Docs] Fix ExecutionContext field names and types
tasks.description: ExecutionContext documentation shows wrong field names and types.

tasks.title: [Docs] Document multiple ExecutionContext classes
tasks.description: Four different ExecutionContext classes exist causing namespace collision

tasks.title: [Docs] Remove init_config_loader - doesn't exist
tasks.description: Function doesn't exist, use ConfigLoader() directly

tasks.title: [Docs] Fix AgentFactory method names
tasks.description: Wrong method names: create_agent() should be create(), register_agent_type() should be register_type()

tasks.description: Documentation missing optional mode parameter

tasks.title: [Docs] Clarify execute() return structure
tasks.description: README claims result['stage_outputs'] exists but structure is engine-specific
